summary: Iteration 4 (refactor + re-audit): 25/25 backend pytest pass including 5 new tests (delete-unknown→404, single re-audit, single re-audit unknown→404, bulk re-audit-missing with DB-stripped audit, bulk all-present, auth isolation). Frontend verified: APK tab renders guidance + audit report, per-row 'Re-audit' link (data-testid reaudit-one-{id}) present for every uploaded APK and triggers successful re-audit. 'Re-audit older uploads' button (data-testid reaudit-missing-button) correctly appears only when at least one APK has audit missing/empty-findings, and disappears after bulk re-run (audit restored in DB with audit_updated_at). Tracker apk-verified-badge and Overview 'APK SDK integrated' row regressions still pass. server.py router refactor preserved behaviour 1:1 for every previously-passing route.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with rescanned=0/skipped=0 when the caller has no APKs in that project (auth isolation case). Arguably should 404 the project for unknown/other-user projects for symmetry with /api/projects/{id}. Low priority.
(carried) full file read into memory before size guard — consider streaming or early size cap.

issues: 'Re-audit' link on each row is a plain underlined blue text — visually similar to an anchor; consider giving it a subtle button affordance or a hover background to make it clearly interactive.

action_items: None blocking. Optional: (a) 404 the project-missing case on /apks/re-audit-missing for parity, (b) add streaming upload or upfront size cap on /apk, (c) give per-row Re-audit link a button-like hover affordance.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now a clean 54-line entrypoint — excellent. Route files are focused and 1:1 ports. deps.py is the only module importing motor/s3 — good separation.

apk.py::re_audit_missing_apks uses `async for` cursor iteration which is memory-efficient. 'needs' predicate `(not apk.get('audit') or not apk.get('audit',{}).get('findings'))` correctly covers both unset and crashed-audit cases.
re_audit_apk returns the mutated `apk` dict with audit+audit_updated_at patched in-memory — matches what was just written to Mongo (good). `_id` already excluded by projection.
projects.py delete_project now raises 404 on missing — matches DELETE-idempotency observability request from iter1 minor.
singular.py test_console: status_code now captured via a pre-declared variable (no more dir() introspection). Behaviour confirmed identical by existing test (ok=false upstream, run persisted).

ApkUpload.jsx: reauditMissing/reauditOne both call load() on success → UI refreshes correctly. Toast messaging distinguishes rescanned / skipped / failures. Button only renders when there's an actual missing audit — prevents noise.
Minor: reauditOne swallows errors as toast only (no row-level spinner). Fine for small audits (<1s) but a per-row 'Re-auditing…' would help if logic grows slower.
test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh: T1_TOKEN=sess_t1_1776839059510 (user test-user-t1-1776839059510), T2_TOKEN=sess_t2_1776839059568. Any prior sess_t1_*/sess_t2_* tokens from earlier iterations still valid — expiry set 7 days.
seed_data_creation: 2 users + 2 user_sessions via mongosh. Ephemeral TEST_* projects created and deleted by each test. Left behind from prior iters: TEST_Iter2_UI* (owned by iter2 test user) — safe to ignore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: T1_TOKEN=<t> T2_TOKEN=<t2> MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py -v. New tests added in iter4: test_delete_project_unknown_returns_404, test_reaudit_single_apk, test_reaudit_single_unknown_returns_404, test_reaudit_missing_bulk (uses pymongo to $unset audit directly), test_reaudit_missing_all_present_returns_zero, test_reaudit_auth_isolation. Frontend testids to rely on: reaudit-missing-button (only when at least one apk has audit missing/empty-findings), reaudit-one-{apk_id} (per row). To exercise missing-branch end-to-end: upload an apk then `mongosh --eval 'db.getSiblingDB("test_database").apk_uploads.updateOne({id:"..."},{$unset:{audit:""}})'` and reload the APK tab.
rca of the issue: No blockers. One testing gotcha (for next agent): after clicking the APK tab, wait ~2s before asserting on reaudit-missing-button — ApkUpload.jsx loads /apks on mount via useEffect, and the button is conditional on that fetch completing. Without the wait, query_selector returns None (false negative).
